tasks.title: Choose one ICP and one niche pain
tasks.description: Finalize the exact segment and pain LeadGent will own in outbound conversations.

tasks.title: Finalize flagship service and add-on
tasks.description: Define one core service package plus one expansion service.

tasks.title: Define offer scope, exclusions, and pricing floor
tasks.description: Avoid custom one-off delivery; set boundaries before outreach volume increases.

tasks.title: Define lead sourcing channels and list criteria
tasks.description: Document where leads come from and strict inclusion filters.

tasks.title: Define enrichment fields and QA checks
tasks.description: Set mandatory enrichment schema and pass/fail data quality checks.

tasks.title: Draft two outbound sequence variants
tasks.description: Prepare two message angles and CTA hypotheses for early tests.

tasks.title: Finalize client onboarding template
tasks.description: Lock kickoff flow, access checklist, and dependencies.

tasks.title: Create weekly reporting SOP
tasks.description: Standardize weekly client update structure and cadence.

tasks.title: Close first client with clear scope
tasks.description: Prioritize clean scope over speed; avoid unclear commitments.

tasks.title: Document first case study asset
tasks.description: Capture before/after, actions taken, and measurable outcome.
